title: rosa × dumetorum suboxyphylla
intro: Rosa × dumetorum suboxyphylla, also known as Rosa × centifolia subsp. oxyphylla or Rosa × centifolia subsp. dumetorum, is a subspecies of rose plant that is characterized by its compact, bushy growth and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Rosa × dumetorum suboxyphylla is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
